no: NE Male Rakshasa Ranger (Naztharune Ranger). Unique race. Install after Drake & Sirene, before White.

dependencies.reason: Verr'Sza NPC crossmod needs Sirene NPC

sum: Adds Verr'Sza, a rakshasa bounty hunter, as a joinable NPC in BG1. An evil-aligned companion with unique dialogue.

co.n: Verr'Sza - the rakshasa NPC for BG1EE
